title: juncus sphacelatus
intro: Juncus sphacelatus, also known as bush rush or bush mat-rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae, native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including wound healing, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Juncus sphacelatus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional.
